No, this was a study. This was a study done by the Professor of Economics at Dartmouth and also the University of Chicago, so it was two people together.

And they found that if people are watching a debate, you can tell who's more likely to win the election by seeing how charismatic and how kind of relaxed and how confident they are. there was no chance of being distracted by the policies being discussed last night, so I think we're okay. That's true.
